title: Strengthen native recovery error surfaces
summary: Replace raw native hydration error strings in the macOS native inspectors with a structured recovery-aware surface backed by the existing native recovery issue model.
acceptance_criteria: Native inspector pages show recovery issue title and recommended next step when native hydration fails.
The shared macOS native page container accepts typed recovery issue context instead of relying only on a raw error string.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and a HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0011 ticket schema validated after switching native inspector error states onto structured recovery-aware surfaces.
Patch hygiene passed after wiring native recovery issue state through the shared page container and overview error surface.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after introducing the structured recovery-aware native error surface.

trigger.source_ref: Re-ranked Top 10 favored typed native error surfaces over already-mostly-complete localization debt.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice stays read-only and improves truthful inspector UX during native import or hydration failure states.
The prior localization item remains valid, but the repo state no longer makes it the highest-value safe slice.
